concerns.text: Success Criterion SC-003 ('All statistical tests must be computed using SciPy (v1.14+) or an equivalent CPU‑only library and documented in the reproducibility package') is not referenced by any user story, leaving its traceability and test relevance ambiguous.

FR-004 includes a placeholder '[deferred]' for the relative tolerance of metric inconsistencies, making the rule unmeasurable (e.g., 'Any reported metric ... beyond a relative tolerance of [deferred] of the larger count').
